summary: Complete testing of PIN hard-coding feature (PIN=3401). All backend API tests passed (8/8). All frontend features verified with Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Hard-coded PIN (3401) implemented correctly in backend (HARD_PIN constant in admin.py)
/api/pins/status returns all pin types as set (true)
Door Codes page: No 'PIN Settings' button - VERIFIED
Door Codes page: 'Edit Codes' button opens dialog WITHOUT admin code field - VERIFIED
Door Codes page: 'Edit Admin' button requires PIN (3401) before opening admin code edit dialog - VERIFIED
Door Codes page: Viewing admin code (eye icon) requires PIN (3401) - VERIFIED
Door Codes page: Wrong PIN (1234) is rejected with 'Incorrect PIN' message - VERIFIED
Login Info page: No 'PIN Settings' button - VERIFIED
Login Info page: PIN 3401 unlocks Medium and High sensitivity levels - VERIFIED
Login Info page: Wrong PIN is rejected - VERIFIED
passed_tests: POST /api/pins/verify with pin=3401 and pin_type=shared returns {valid:true}
POST /api/pins/verify with pin=3401 and pin_type=level_2 returns {valid:true}
POST /api/pins/verify with pin=3401 and pin_type=level_3 returns {valid:true}
GET /api/pins/status returns all pin types as set (true)
Door Codes page loads without 'PIN Settings' button
Door Codes page 'Edit Codes' dialog has no admin code field
Door Codes page 'Edit Admin' requires PIN verification
Door Codes page eye icon (view admin code) requires PIN verification
Door Codes page wrong PIN (1234) rejected
Door Codes page correct PIN (3401) unlocks admin features
Login Info page loads without 'PIN Settings' button
Login Info page Medium level unlock requires PIN
Login Info page High level unlock requires PIN
Login Info page wrong PIN rejected
Login Info page correct PIN (3401) unlocks both Medium and High levels
seed_data_creation: None - used existing door codes data for Unit 7 in property 1144
context_for_next_testing_agent: PIN is now hard-coded to 3401 in backend (HARD_PIN constant in /app/backend/routers/admin.py). The /api/pins/set endpoint has been removed. All pin types (shared, level_2, level_3) verify against the same hard PIN 3401. Door Codes page has separate 'Edit Codes' (for regular codes) and 'Edit Admin' (PIN-gated for admin code) buttons. Login Info page requires PIN to unlock Medium and High sensitivity levels. Key data-testids: door-codes-page-title, door-codes-edit-btn, door-codes-edit-admin-btn, door-code-unlock-btn, door-code-pin-input, door-code-pin-verify-btn, door-code-admin_code-input, door-code-admin-save-btn, login-info-page-title, login-info-level-1/2/3, login-unlock-level-2/3, login-pin-input, login-pin-verify-btn. App password: emergeontop. Hard PIN: 3401.
